content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.42% with VIX +2.5% to 17.04, but strong sectoral dispersion: IT +0.71%, Pharma +0.51% leading; Banks/Energy/PSU weak. Heavy Q4 results day with multiple large beats (POLYCAB, COFORGE, LUPIN, PIDILITIND, SRF, CAMS, WOCKPHARMA, MARICO, NAVINFLUOR) — book is well-positioned. Priority: trail SLs on multiple winners (HAL, COFORGE, CAMS, PNBHOUSING) where structural gains warrant locking in. Deployed at 67%, room to add but cluster discipline matters — already 3 chemical names + 2 pharma + capital goods exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +9.6%. Trail-gap discipline: stored SL 1064.67 is only 1.25% below CMP 1078 — too tight, will fire on normal noise. Loosening is not allowed; tightening below stored SL also risks self-stopout. Lowering proposed SL to 1055 — wait, that's loosening, rejected. Keeping at 1055 violates monotonic-up. Re-stating: stored SL 1064.67, CMP 1078, gap 1.25%. Cannot move SL up further without violating 1% trail-gap. HOLD is correct here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY: stored SL 1064.67 vs CMP 1078 is a 1.25% gap — already at the trail-gap floor. Tightening further self-stopouts on noise. Position +9.6%, target 1135 still 5.3% away. Let it run; SL already protects breakeven+8%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -0.4%, CMP 124.45, SL 121 (-2.7% from CMP). Within normal noise. Defensive ballast in book. SL respects original placement; no new info to change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Skip — no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "HAL +4.8%, CMP 4790, stored SL 4725.56 (1.34% gap — at trail-gap floor). May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is 4 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary-event window for now, but rule 11 will trigger next session. For now hold; will need to decide on event-trade disposition by May 12. Position size 5.0% of capital — already event-trade-sized."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "NAVINFLUOR +2.2%, CMP 7043, stored SL 6960 (1.18% gap — at trail-gap floor). Q4 already printed strong (PAT +124%), no pending binary. Specialty chem cluster running; let it work toward 7250 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -0.9%, CMP 365.50, stored SL 365 (0.14% gap — already self-stopout territory). Cannot tighten further (already too tight). Cannot loosen. Either it bounces or SL fires today — accept that as the SL doing its job. No exit on intraday wobble (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "No-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +1.3%, CMP 830.60, SL 822 (1.04% gap — exactly at trail-gap floor). Cannot tighten without self-stopout. Q4 print clean, FMCG defensive bid intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1332.00,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +6.9%, CMP 1351.20. Stored SL 1329.47 is 1.61% below CMP — room to tighten while respecting 1% trail-gap floor. Moving SL up to 1332 (1.42% below CMP) — modest +0.19% tighten, locks in +5.8% gain minimum. Q4 PAT +144% QoQ, FY26 PAT +91.6%, EBIT margin +370bps — thesis fully validated. Note: this is +0.19% tighten which may be sub-0.5% threshold (Rule 14 micro-adjust). Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "Correcting: SL move 1329.47→1332 is 0.19%, below the 0.5% micro-adjust threshold. Hold stored SL. Position +6.9%, target 1395 still 3.2% away. Strong Q4 print, IT outperforming."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "GRSE +1.4%, CMP 3062.50, SL 2998 (2.10% gap). Defense thesis intact, Q4 already printed strong. Not yet at +2% trail trigger by enough margin to warrant tighten beyond 1% floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "CAMS +4.6%, CMP 842.60, SL 827.41 (1.80% gap). Could tighten further but currently fine — leaves room. Q4 strong, near 52w high. Let target 875 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -0.6%, CMP 1481.20, SL 1445 (2.44% gap). Q4 print today was strong (PAT +37%, margin +310bps). Intraday fade off morning gap-up high 1515 within normal noise, well within SL absorption."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "LUPIN -2.0%, CMP 2433.20, SL 2400 (1.37% gap). Q4 print today was excellent (PBT +115%, US sales +46%, 900% dividend). Stock pulling back from intraday high 2475 — normal post-results profit-taking, not thesis break. Respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.2%, CMP 1614.80, SL 1580 (2.16% gap). Q4 turnaround print confirmed. Within normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "SRF flat, CMP 2782, SL 2700 (2.95% gap). Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 PAT +46.7%. Sector cluster strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at entry, CMP 9103.50, SL 8800 (3.34% gap). Just entered today. Q4 record (revenue +27%, PAT +32%, market share gains). Brokerage targets 9800. Let it work."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at 1.25% below CMP — at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive ballast, within noise."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 — will need to decide event disposition by May 12."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor, Q4 already printed."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL extremely tight at 0.14% — accept whatever today brings."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL move would be sub-0.5% micro-adjust."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defense thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Adequate gap, near target."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 print just landed strong."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 print excellent today, intraday wobble."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within noise."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Just entered, Q4 strong."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Just entered today."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Qualifying BULLISH candidates surfaced today with material confidence modifiers: FINCABLES (-0.05 NEUTRAL — REJECT, May 10 binary results in 2 sessions, Rule 11), POLYCAB (+0.10 already held), SRF (+0.07 already held), PIDILITIND (+0.10 already held), COFORGE (+0.10 already held), CAMS (+0.08 already held), LUPIN (+0.10 already held), MARICO (+0.07 already held), GRSE (+0.10 already held), WOCKPHARMA (+0.05 already held), NAVINFLUOR (+0.04 already held), HAL (+0.06 already held — May 14 binary in 4 sessions). Of qualifying NEW-name candidates, FINCABLES is the only one and it fails Rule 11 (binary in 2 sessions, plus negative -0.05 modifier and -28% from 52w high signaling negative skew on results). THERMAX, BHARATFORG (already pending OPEN @ 2015 from prior session — leave alone, no second order), GABRIEL, NH, RAMCOCEM, TITAGARH, KPIL, LAURUSLABS, TATATECH, SOBHA were not among the deep-dive batch this tick — no fresh data to act on. Book is well-deployed at 67% with 11 of 14 names held already on bullish Q4 prints. Adding more without fresh research data = anchoring. Let existing winners run.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong day: +1.50% total P&L, multiple Q4 prints validating positions (POLYCAB, COFORGE, LUPIN, PIDILITIND, SRF, CAMS, WOCKPHARMA, MARICO, NAVINFLUOR all reported strong this week). Deployed 67%, cash ₹338K (33%) — within soft-target range. Cluster check: Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR + SRF + PIDILITIND) ~17% capital — at the 20% cluster soft-cap, no room to add. Pharma (LUPIN + WOCKPHARMA) ~9%. Capital goods (HAL + GRSE + POLYCAB) ~16%. Financial services (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) ~10%. No single cluster breaching cap. HAL May 14 board meeting will need event-trade disposition by May 12 (3 sessions out — Rule 11). Pending BHARATFORG BUY @ 2015 still OPEN from earlier — leaving as-is, thesis intact. HFCL MIS pending from 3266m ago (2+ days) is stale — flagging for cancel review next tick. Performance context: 5-day win rate 15% but profit factor 1.1x; cumulative -1893. Today's prints should help the cumulative materially by EOD if winners hold."
}
